# Pull Request

Thanks for taking the time to send a patch! Please fill out the
sections below — they help reviewers triage quickly.

## Summary

<!-- One or two paragraphs. What does this PR change and why? -->

## Linked issues

<!-- Use closing keywords: Closes #123, Fixes #456, Refs #789. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## How was it tested?

<!-- Be specific. -->

- [ ] Unit tests (`cargo test --workspace`)
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual on Linux: distro + compositor
- [ ] Manual on macOS:
- [ ] Manual on Windows:
- [ ] No testing performed (please justify)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have signed off every commit (`git commit --signoff`)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] I have added tests for new behaviour
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## Unreleased`
- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`

## Screenshots / logs

<!-- Optional. Attach artefacts (use markdown image syntax for images,
     fenced code blocks for logs). -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay particular attention to. -->
